kobeGreen:DeftStrike.NAME: Deft Strike
kobeGreen:DeftStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage twice. NL Dexterity affects the damage of this card.
kobeGreen:DeftStrike.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage twice. NL Dexterity affects the damage of this card twice.

kobeGreen:HuntDown.NAME: Hunt Down
kobeGreen:HuntDown.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Whenever this card is drawn, increase its damage by !M! this combat.

kobeGreen:Petrify.NAME: Petrify
kobeGreen:Petrify.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Enemy prevents the next time it would lose HP.

kobeGreen:AceInTheHole.NAME: Ace in the Hole
kobeGreen:AceInTheHole.DESCRIPTION: Retain. NL Add !M! *Shivs+ into your hand.

kobeGreen:Camouflage.NAME: Camouflage
kobeGreen:Camouflage.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL You have 3 additional Dexterity until !M! more Skills are played.

kobeGreen:Improvise.NAME: Improvise
kobeGreen:Improvise.DESCRIPTION: Choose 1 of !M! non-Green Skills to add into your hand. NL It costs 1 less this turn. NL Exhaust.

kobeGreen:InvisibleThreads.NAME: Invisible Threads
kobeGreen:InvisibleThreads.DESCRIPTION: Shuffle up to !M! cards from your discard pile into your draw pile. NL Exhaust.
kobeGreen:InvisibleThreads.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Shuffle up to !M! cards from your discard pile into your draw pile.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: card to shuffle into your draw pile.
cards to shuffle into your draw pile.

kobeGreen:Poise.NAME: Poise
kobeGreen:Poise.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL The next Skill you play costs 0.

kobeGreen:PoisonCocktail.NAME: Poison Cocktail
kobeGreen:PoisonCocktail.DESCRIPTION: Discard up to !kobeGreen:SecondMagic! cards and apply !M! Poison for each card type among them.

kobeGreen:Quagmire.NAME: Quagmire
kobeGreen:Quagmire.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! Poison. NL Draw 1 card for each unique debuff the enemy has.

kobeGreen:SmokeAndMirrors.NAME: Smoke and Mirrors
kobeGreen:SmokeAndMirrors.DESCRIPTION: Add !M! *Decoys into your hand. NL Your *Decoys are Retained this turn.
kobeGreen:SmokeAndMirrors.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Add !M! *Decoys+ into your hand. NL Your *Decoys are Retained this turn.

kobeGreen:WickedGift.NAME: Wicked Gift
kobeGreen:WickedGift.DESCRIPTION: Discard a card. NL If it is a Skill, NL apply !M! Vulnerable. NL If it is a non-Skill card, apply !M! Weak.

kobeGreen:Condition.NAME: Condition
kobeGreen:Condition.DESCRIPTION: Add !M! *Shivs into your hand. Whenever you discard a *Shiv, ALL enemies lose !kobeGreen:SecondMagic! Strength for 1 turn.

kobeGreen:Poltergeist.NAME: Poltergeist
kobeGreen:Poltergeist.DESCRIPTION: Every other time you draw a 0-cost card, draw 1 card.
kobeGreen:Poltergeist.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL Every other time you draw a 0-cost card, draw 1 card.

kobeGreen:Unpredictable.NAME: Unpredictable
kobeGreen:Unpredictable.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Dexterity. NL At the start of your turn, exchange your Strength and Dexterity.

kobeGreen:Decoy.NAME: Decoy
kobeGreen:Decoy.DESCRIPTION: Unplayable. NL If this card is discarded from your hand, gain !B! Block NL and Exhaust.
